name: parkingbreaker_telemetry_observer
description: Fetches per-city funnel and payment telemetry from ParkingBreaker FastAPI. Used by the Growth Manager persona to identify cities for Reddit ad budget changes.

tools.name: get_city_performance
tools.description: GET /telemetry/stats/{city_id} — returns last 30 days of funnel steps, outcomes, and event counts for one city.

city_id.description: Canonical city ID e.g. us-ca-san_francisco. Must match backend/cities/*.json basenames.

tools.name: get_all_city_performance
tools.description: Calls get_city_performance for all 63 active cities and returns a summary table with recommendations.

vault_secrets.description: Shared secret matching PB_INTERNAL_TOKEN on the backend. Generate with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

schedule.openclaw_command: openclaw schedule "Every 4 hours check ParkingBreaker city stats and surface Reddit spend recommendations"
